text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober has been preoccupied with
something ever since the Fan Fest. She manages
to pull herself together right before her race,
but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the paddock, she runs into Mejiro Bright and is
nearly crushed by her friend's oppressive aura and
focus. It's clear how determined Mejiro Bright is
to win the spring Tenno Sho.
